goal: set_preimage[X, Y](f, t.c) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, t).c
X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, t)) and X.is_open(set_preimage[X, Y](f, t).c)
set_preimage[X, Y](f, t) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, Set.empty_set[Y])
set_preimage[X, Y](f, t) = set_preimage[X, Y](f, Set.universal_set[Y])
set_preimage[X, Y](f, t) = Set.empty_set[X] or set_preimage[X, Y](f, t) = Set.universal_set[X]
proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool, x1: Set[T0]) { not is_connected_via_clopen[T0](x0) or not is_clopen[T0](x0, x1) or Set.universal_set[T0] = x1 or Set.empty_set[T0] = x1 }[X](X.is_open, set_preimage[X, Y](f, t))

goal: is_clopen[Y](Y.is_open, t) implies t = Set.empty_set[Y] or t = Set.universal_set[Y]
is_clopen[Y](Y.is_open, t) implies t = Set.empty_set[Y] or t = Set.universal_set[Y]
proof: function(x0: Set[Y]) { not is_clopen[Y](Y.is_open, x0) or Set.universal_set[Y] = x0 or Set.empty_set[Y] = x0 }(t)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0] -> Bool) { forall(x1: Set[T0]) { not is_clopen[T0](x0, x1) or (Set.empty_set[T0] = x1 or Set.universal_set[T0] = x1) } = is_connected_via_clopen[T0](x0) }[Y](Y.is_open)
